description:
Write stdin bytes to a running `command/exec` session, close stdin, or
both.

closeStdin.description: Close stdin after writing `deltaBase64`, if present.

deltaBase64.description: Optional base64-encoded stdin bytes to write.

processId.description:
Client-supplied, connection-scoped `processId` from the original
`command/exec` request.

title: CommandExecWriteParams
